scoring_context.product: Best for Pet — preventative pet care subscription at local vet clinics ($50/month)
scoring_context.audience: Pet parents, ~75% female, 25-55, Australia. They love their pets deeply but dread unpredictable vet costs. 76% worry about affording vet bills. 74% have felt guilty about delaying care.
key_motivations: Predictability — knowing what I pay each month matters more than saving money
Guilt relief — never delaying a vet visit because of cost uncertainty
Simplicity — one fee covers everything routine, no claims, no excess
Trust — delivered at their local vet by a vet they already know
scoring_context.brand_values: Warm, alongside the reader, never above. Like a friend who also has pets. Not corporate, not clinical. Australian English, relaxed.
scoring_context.success_looks_like: Reader feels relieved, understood, and clear on what they get for $50/month. They want to check if their local vet participates.

approved_ctas: Find a participating clinic near you
Check availability at a clinic near you
prompt_objection_signals: Include: "no joining fee", "no waiting period", "cancel anytime", "not insurance", "no claims/excess".

prompt_rules.meta-ad:
- No em-dashes (use full stops, commas, or colons)
- No commands ("stop", "add it up", "do the maths")
- No condescension ("we'll wait", "simple maths")
- Lead with value/benefit, not price

prompt_extra_rules.meta-ad:
- No em-dashes (use full stops, commas, or colons)
- No commands ("stop", "add it up", "do the maths")
- No condescension ("we'll wait", "simple maths")
- Lead with value/benefit, not price
- Every number must trace to a verified fact above
